query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'game_agents' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%crystal%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'game_agents' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%spirit%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'game_agents' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%stone%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'game_agents' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%crystal%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'game_agents' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%spirit%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'game_agents' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%stone%');
